data.title: Ethereum breaks $4,700 as whale accumulates $28M in ETH and WBTC
data.description:
13-9-2025 – Ethereum has surpassed the $4,700 threshold, reaching $4,701. 47 USDT on Binance, marking a 4. 28% rise over the past 24 hours. This surge coincides with aggressive buying from a major investor who has ramped up positions in ETH and Wrapped Bitcoin since September 9
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ethereum-breaks-4700-as-whale-accumulates-28m-in-eth-and-wbtc/

data.title: Gemini's stock price rose 14.29% on its first day of listing, with a total market capitalization of US$3.801 billion.
data.description: According to market data, Gemini Space Station (GEMI) closed up 14.29% on its first day of listing (compared to its IPO price of $28). The maximum increase at the opening was 45.39%, breaking through $40. Since then, the price has continued to fall, closing at $32. The total market value is temporarily reported at $3.801 billion, the trading volume reached $1.182 billion, and the trading volume reached 32.9888 million shares.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Gemini's stock price rose 14.29% on its first day of listing, with a total market capitalization of US$3.801 billion. 2. Bitcoin treasury company Prenetics disclosed holdings of 288.42 BTC and has initiated a daily programmatic accumulation strategy. 3. The address that hoarded 1.51 trillion PEPE yesterday may belong to Wintermute. 4. HIFI's 24-hour price rose over 320% and is currently trading at 0.38 USDT. 5. The Massachusetts Attorney General accused prediction market Kalshi of violating sports betting laws. 6. JPMorgan Chase: The Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by 25 basis points next week. 7. Market News: Polymarket is raising a new round of financing, with a post-investment valuation of at least US$3 billion. 8. Tesla Chairman: Musk has completed his political service and returned to Tesla. 9. Tether will launch the US-based stablecoin USAT and appoint Bo Hines as CEO.

data.title: Whales Increase PEPE Holdings with Significant Purchases
data.description: According to Foresight News, several major investors are acquiring large amounts of PEPE tokens. Onchain Lens monitoring reveals that a whale with the address starting 0x7c8 spent $2.5 million in USDT to purchase 213.46 billion PEPE tokens, transferring them to their main wallet. Another whale, with an address beginning 0xe84, invested $1.018 million in USDC/USDT to acquire 89.73 billion PEPE tokens.

data.title: Ondo Finance Surges 20% Weekly Amid Hype and Growing DeFi Demand
data.description:
Ondo Finance (ONDO) has risen as one of the top performers in the market this week, surging 20% to trade around $1. 10. The rally comes as demand for real-world asset (RWA) tokenization accelerates, pushing Ondo’s TVL to record highs. Related Reading: Cardano Is Not Dead: Analyst Confirms Breakout With New ADA Price Targets The recently launched Ondo Global Markets platform has been a major growth driver, attracting over $160 million in assets within days
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ondo-finance-surges-20-weekly-amid-hype-and-growing-defi-demand/

data.title: A whale has increased its holdings of WBTC and ETH by $12 million in the past 8 hours.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a major investor who bought the dip in ETH and BTC on September 9th is still increasing their holdings, having spent a cumulative $28 million on their positions over the past five days. In the past eight hours, this investor has purchased another $8 million in ETH and $4 million in WBTC through Cowswap. Current holdings and costs are as follows: ETH: 3,550.67 (US$16 million), average cost of $4,506.19, and a floating profit of $727,000; WBTC: 104.52 (US$12 million), average cost of $114,810.56, and a floating profit of $147,000.

data.title: The address that hoarded 1.51 trillion PEPE yesterday may belong to Wintermute
data.description: According to on-chain analyst @ai_9684 xtpa, the address hoarding 1.51 trillion PEPE yesterday may belong to market maker Wintermute. When Wintermute was betting on the meme craze at the end of 2024, PEPE was once among its top five publicly held tokens. Earlier news also revealed that a newly created address withdrew 1.51 trillion PEPE from Kraken yesterday, valued at approximately $15.95 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Company Prenetics Discloses Holding 288.42 BTC and Has Launched a Daily Programmatic Accumulation Strategy
data.description: Prenetics Global Limited, a Nasdaq-listed health sciences company, released its unaudited second-quarter financial results, revealing revenue of $17.7 million, a 594.9% increase compared to the second quarter of 2024. Adjusted current assets reached $90.3 million, including $63.5 million in cash. Furthermore, as of September 10, 2025, Prenetics Global Limited held 228.42 Bitcoins (BTC), valued at $26.1 million, and currently has no debt. The company stated that it has initiated a daily programmatic Bitcoin accumulation program (one BTC per day) since August 1, 2025, funded by its own operating funds.

data.title: A whale deposited 5.1 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 20x ETH short position.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created whale wallet deposited 5.1 million USDC into HyperLiquid and established an ETH short position with 20x leverage. The entry price was $4,718.1 and the liquidation price was $5,086.8.

data.title: HIFI's 24-hour price surged by over 320%, now trading at 0.38 USDT.
data.description: Market data shows that HIFI has risen by more than 320% in 24 hours and is currently trading at 0.38 USDT.

data.title: Over the past four hours, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of over $140 million, mainly due to short positions.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has experienced a liquidation of US$142 million, of which short positions have been liquidated for US$121 million and long positions have been liquidated for US$20.9699 million.

data.title: New malware, ModStealer, is targeting cryptocurrency users on macOS, Windows, and Linux.
data.description: Security firm Mosyle has revealed that a newly discovered malware strain, ModStealer, is targeting cryptocurrency users on platforms including macOS, Windows, and Linux. Researchers noted that the malware remained undetected by mainstream antivirus tools for nearly a month after being uploaded to VirusTotal. Mosyle stated that ModStealer is specifically designed to steal private keys, certificates, credential files, and browser wallet data. Its built-in code targets 56 wallet extensions for Safari and Chromium browsers. (FinanceFeeds)

data.title: Massachusetts Attorney General Charges Prediction Market Kalshi with Violating Sports Betting Laws
data.description: Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Joy Campbell alleges in a lawsuit that the prediction market Kalshi violated Massachusetts gambling laws. The filing alleges that Kalshi's proposed sports betting contracts in January 2025 violated the state's sports betting law, which requires operators to hold a license. Campbell is asking the court to enjoin Kalshi from operating the unlicensed sports prediction market in the state and is seeking monetary and other relief. (Coindesk)

data.title: Coinbase will upgrade all MATIC tokens to POL from October 14th to 17th
data.description: According to an official announcement from Coinbase, Polygon PoS has upgraded its token from MATIC to POL. Coinbase will convert all Polygon (MATIC) tokens (including staked assets) to the Polygon Ecosystem Token (POL) from October 14th to 17th. During the migration, rewards for staking Polygon (MATIC) will not accrue.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: The Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by 25 basis points next week
data.description: Michael Feroli, a US economist at JPMorgan Chase, predicts the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by 25 basis points next week. He also noted that there are two or three dissenters who favor a larger rate cut, but no one favors keeping rates unchanged. The dot plot is still expected to show one more rate cut after 2025. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hunter Albright: 20-25% of Asia's population currently owns Bitcoin
data.description: According to an article published by Bitcoin Magazine on the X platform, Hunter Albright, Chief Risk Officer of SALT, said that in Asia, 20 to 25% of the population currently owns Bitcoin.

data.title: Prenetics Global Reports Significant Revenue Growth and Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to PANews, Prenetics Global Limited, a Nasdaq-listed health sciences company, has released its unaudited financial results for the second quarter. The company reported a revenue of $17.7 million, marking a 594.9% increase compared to the second quarter of 2024. The adjusted current assets reached $90.3 million, including $63.5 million in cash.

As of September 10, 2025, Prenetics Global Limited holds 228.42 bitcoins, valued at $26.1 million, and currently has no liabilities. The company announced that it began a daily systematic increase in its bitcoin holdings on August 1, 2025, acquiring one bitcoin per day using its operational funds.

data.title: Major Investor Increases Holdings in ETH and WBTC
data.description:
According to PANews, a significant investor who began accumulating Ethereum (ETH) and Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) on September 9 has continued to expand their holdings. Over the past five days, the investor has spent a total of $28 million on these cryptocurrencies. In the last eight hours alone, they purchased $8 million worth of ETH and $4 million worth of WBTC through Cowswap.

Currently, the investor holds 3,550.67 ETH, valued at $16 million, with an average cost of $4,506.19 per ETH, resulting in an unrealized profit of $727,000. Additionally, they possess 104.52 WBTC, valued at $12 million, with an average cost of $114,810.56 per WBTC, leading to an unrealized profit of $147,000.

data.title: Most US crypto treasury companies closed higher, with ETH treasury company BMNR rising by over 15%.
data.description: According to MyStonks data, at the close of US stocks, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.59% to 45,834.22 points; the S&P 500 fell 0.05% to 6,584.29 points; and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.44% to 22,141.1 points. Most crypto treasury companies saw gains. Forward Industries Inc. (FORD), a SOL treasury company, closed up 4.70% at $36.10; Sol Strategies Inc. (STKE), closed up 7.51% at $7.37; MicroStrategy Incorporated (MSTR), a Bitcoin treasury company, closed up 1.66%; and Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (BMNR), an Ethereum treasury company, opened up 15.28%. It is reported that MyStonks is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has launched hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF token targets such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Ethereum Validator Slashing Puts Cardano’s Resilience In Focus – Here’s Why
data.description:
A recent slashing of Ethereum from different validators has reignited the debate around staking models, with many pointing to Cardano’s more resilient structure as a key differentiator. While Ethereum’s system penalizes validators for downtime or misbehavior, Cardano’s staking approach avoids such risks, offering delegators security without the fear of losing funds. Why Simplicity And Resilience Are Cardano’s Key Advantages On September 10, a slashing of 11. 7 ETH from 39 Ethereum validators highlights the advantages of Cardano’s staking structure
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-validator-slashing/
